# services.docuseal

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.docuseal`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.docuseal.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable DocuSeal, open source document signing. |
| `services.docuseal.extraConfig` | `attribute set` | Extra environment variables to pass to DocuSeal services. Refer to <https://www.docuseal.com/docs/configuring-docuseal-via-environment-variables>. |
| `services.docuseal.extraEnvFiles` | `list of absolute path` | Extra environment files to pass to DocuSeal services. Useful for passing down environmental secrets. e.g. DATABASE_URL |
| `services.docuseal.host` | `string` | DocuSeal host. |
| `services.docuseal.package` | `package` | The docuseal package to use. |
| `services.docuseal.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | DocuSeal port. |
| `services.docuseal.redis.createLocally` | `boolean` | Whether to create a local redis automatically. |
| `services.docuseal.redis.host` | `string` | Redis server address. |
| `services.docuseal.redis.name` | `string` | Name of the redis server. Only used if `createLocally` is set to true. |
| `services.docuseal.redis.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the redis server. |
| `services.docuseal.secretKeyBaseFile` | `absolute path` | Path to file containing the secret key base. A new secret key base can be generated by running: `openssl rand -hex 64` If this file does not exist, it will be created with a new secret key base. |
